get.description: Retrieves a Author by its identifier.

delete.description: Deletes an author if the author has no associated books.

get.description: Retrieves a lightweight list of authors for lookup purposes.
Retrieves a book by its identifier.

put.description: Updates an existing book basic info.

delete.description: Deletes a Book if it has no borrow history.

put.description: Updates an existing book cover image  .

get.description: Retrieves the borrowing history of a book.

post.description: Borrows a book for a library member.

get.description: Retrieves a borrowing transaction by its identifier..

post.description: Returns a borrowed book by its borrowing transaction identifier.

get.description: Retrieves a category by its identifier.

delete.description: Deletes a category if it has no books or subcategories.

get.description: Retrieves a lightweight list of categories for lookup purposes.

post.description: Authenticates a user using email and password and returns a JWT access token.

get.description: Retrieves a Member by its identifier.

delete.description: Deletes a Member if it has no borrowing history.

get.description: Retrieves the borrowing history of a member.
Retrieves a Publisher by its identifier.

delete.description: Deletes a Publisher if it has no books.

get.description: Retrieves a lightweight list of publishers for lookup purposes.

post.description: Creates a new system user (Staff, Librarian, Administrator).

get.description: Retrieves a system user by their identifier.

put.description: Updates an existing system user's information and role.

delete.description: Deletes a system user from the system.
